subcodes.first_line: In these days, at every moment, the import of the blessed words "We shall make their highest ones their lowest ones, and their lowest ones their highest ones" is manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام در هر حین مفاد کلمه مبارکه نجعل اعلیهم اسفلهم و اسفلهم اعلیهم ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
